debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
k : Fin n
S : List (Call n)
h : allKnow (after n S) k
⊢ n - 1 < S.length

failed_attempts:
have h₁ : (after S) k k := by
    apply h
    exact k
  have h₂ : ∀ i : Fin n, (after S) i k := h
  have h₃ : S.length ≥ n - 1 := by
    apply Nat.le_of_lt_succ
    apply Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt
    · apply Nat.sub_le
    · sorry
  omega

have h₁ : (after S) k k := h k
  have h₂ : ∀ i : Fin n, (after S) i k := h
  have h₃ : (initialState n) k k := by simp [initialState]
  have h₄ : ¬(initialState n) i k := by
    intro i
    simp [initialState]
    exact fun h => Fin.ne_of_lt (Fin.lt_iff_ne.mpr h) rfl
  have h₅ : ∃ m, m ≤ S.length ∧ (∀ i : Fin n, (makeCalls (initialState n) (S.take m)) i k) ∧
      (∀ j < m, ¬∀ i : Fin n, (makeCalls (initialState n) (S.take j)) i k) :=
    exists_to_minimal_exists (fun m => ∀ i : Fin n, (makeCalls (initialState n) (S.take m)) i k)
  rcases h₅ with ⟨m, hm₁, hm₂, hm₃⟩
  have h₆ : m > 0 := by
    intro h₆
    simp_all [Nat.le_zero_iff]
    exact h₄ k
  have h₇ : m ≤ S.length := hm₁
  have h₈ : ∀ i : Fin n, (makeCalls (initialState n) (S.take m)) i k := hm₂
  have h₉ : ∀ j < m, ¬∀ i : Fin n, (makeCalls (initialState n) (S.take j)) i k := hm₃
  have h₁₀ : m ≥ n - 1 + 1 := by
    apply Nat.succ_le_of_lt
    have h₁₁ : (S.take m).length = m := by simp
    have h₁₂ : ∀ i : Fin n, i ≠ k → ∃ c ∈ (S.take m), c.fst = i ∨ c.snd = i := by
      intro i hi
      have h₁₃ : (makeCalls (initialState n) (S.take m)) i k := h₈ i
      have h₁₄ : ¬(makeCalls (initialState n) (S.take (m - 1))) i k :=
        by
          have h₁₅ : m - 1 < m := Nat.sub_lt (by linarith) (by linarith)
          exact hm₃ (m - 1) h₁₅ i
      have h₁₆ : (S.take m).getLastD (default := (0, 0)) = S[m - 1] := by
        simp [List.getLastD_take]
      have h₁₇ : (makeCalls (initialState n) (S.take m)) =
          makeCall (makeCalls (initialState n) (S.take (m - 1))) (S[m - 1]) := by
        simp [makeCalls, List.foldl_append, List.take_concat]
      rw [h₁₇] at h₁₃
      simp [makeCall, Function.update] at h₁₃
      tauto
    have h₁₈ : (S.take m).countP (λ c => c.fst = k ∨ c.snd = k) ≥ n - 1 := by
      have h₁₉ : Fintype.card (Fin n) = n := by simp
      have h₂₀ : Fintype.card {i : Fin n // i ≠ k} = n - 1 := by
        simp [Fintype.card_subtype_compl, h₁₉]
      have h₂₁ : ∀ i : {i : Fin n // i ≠ k}, ∃ c ∈ (S.take m), c.fst = i.val ∨ c.snd = i.val := by
        intro i
        exact h₁₂ i.val i.property
      have h₂₂ : (S.take m).length ≥ n - 1 := by
        calc
          (S.take m).length = (S.take m).countP (λ c => true) := by simp
          _ ≥ (S.take m).countP (λ c => c.fst = k ∨ c.snd = k) := by
            apply List.countP_le_countP_of_subset
            intro c hc
            simp_all
          _ ≥ n - 1 := by
            have h₂₃ : (S.take m).countP (λ c => c.fst = k ∨ c.snd = k) ≥
                Fintype.card {i : Fin n // i ≠ k} := by
              apply Nat.le_of_subsingleton
              sorry
            linarith
      linarith
    linarith
  linarith

have h₁ : (after S) k k := by simp [allKnow] at h; exact h k
  have h₂ : ∀ i : Fin n, (after S) i k := by simp [allKnow] at h; exact h
  have h₃ : ∃ T ⊆ S, T.length = n - 1 ∧ ∀ i : Fin n, (after T) i k := by
    apply exists_subset_of_allKnow
    exact h
  rcases h₃ with ⟨T, hT₁, hT₂, hT₃⟩
  have h₄ : T.length ≤ S.length := by apply List.length_le_of_sublist hT₁
  omega

have h₁ : ∀ i : Fin n, (after S) i k := h
  have h₂ : (after S) k k := h₁ k
  have h₃ : ∀ i : Fin n, i ≠ k → ∃ c ∈ S, c.fst = i ∧ c.snd = k ∨ c.fst = k ∧ c.snd = i := by
    intro i hi
    have h₄ : (after S) i k := h₁ i
    have h₅ : ¬ (initialState n) i k := by
      simp [initialState, hi]
    have h₆ : ∃ t ≤ S.length, (after (S.take t)) i k ∧ ∀ t' < t, ¬ (after (S.take t')) i k := by
      apply exists_to_minimal_exists
      use S.length
      exact h₄
    rcases h₆ with ⟨t, t_le, h₇, h₈⟩
    cases t
    · simp_all
    · have h₉ : (after (S.take (t - 1))) i k → False := h₈ (t - 1) (Nat.sub_lt (Nat.zero_lt_of_lt t_le) (by norm_num))
      have h₁₀ : (after (S.take t)) i k := h₇
      have h₁₁ : S.take t = (S.take (t - 1)) ++ [S[t - 1]] := by
        rw [List.take_succ']
        omega
      rw [h₁₁] at h₁₀
      simp [makeCalls, h₁₁] at h₁₀
      cases h₁₀
      · contradiction
      · cases ‹_›
        · left
          constructor
          · exact List.mem_of_nthLe (S := S) (p := Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.sub_lt (Nat.zero_lt_of_lt t_le) (by norm_num)) t_le)
          · tauto
        · right
          constructor
          · exact List.mem_of_nthLe (S := S) (p := Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.sub_lt (Nat.zero_lt_of_lt t_le) (by norm_num)) t_le)
          · tauto
  have h₄ : Fintype.card (Fin n) = n := by simp
  have h₅ : Fintype.card {i : Fin n // i ≠ k} = n - 1 := by
    rw [Fintype.card_subtype_compl, h₄]
    simp
  have h₆ : n - 1 ≤ S.length := by
    calc
      n - 1 = Fintype.card {i : Fin n // i ≠ k} := h₅
      _ ≤ S.length := by
        apply Fintype.card_le_of_injective
        · intro i j hij
          simp_all
        · intro i
          rcases h₃ i.1 i.2 with ⟨c, hc, hc'⟩
          exact ⟨c, hc⟩
  omega

revert h
  induction S with
  | nil => simp [allKnow, after, initialState]
  | cons c S IH =>
    simp_all [allKnow, after, makeCalls, updateState]
    intro h
    cases n
    · simp_all
    · have : (Fin.last n.succ).val = n := by simp [Fin.last]
      have h' : ∀ i : Fin n.succ, (after S) i k ∨ (i = c.fst ∧ (after S) c.snd k) ∨ (i = c.snd ∧ (after S) c.fst k) := by
        intro i
        specialize h i
        simp_all [updateState]
      have h'' : ∀ i : Fin n.succ, i ≠ k → (after S) i k ∨ (i = c.fst ∧ (after S) c.snd k) ∨ (i = c.snd ∧ (after S) c.fst k) := by
        intro i hi
        exact h' i
      apply Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt _ (IH (by
        intro i
        cases i
        · simp_all
        · specialize h'' ⟨i, by linarith⟩ (by simp_all)
          tauto))
      simp

revert h
  induction S with
  | nil => simp [allKnow, after, initialState]
  | cons c S' IH =>
    simp_all [allKnow, after, makeCall, initialState]
    intro h
    cases n
    · simp_all
    · have : (Fin.last n.succ).val = n := by simp [Fin.last]
      have h' := h (Fin.last n.succ)
      simp_all [Fin.last, Fin.val_zero]
      omega

cases n
  case zero => simp_all
  case succ n =>
    have : (n + 1 : ℕ) - 1 ≤ S.length := by
      apply Nat.le_of_lt_succ
      apply Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt _ (Nat.succ_le_succ (Nat.zero_le _))
      simp_all [allKnow, after, makeCalls, initialState]
    omega

have h₁ : ∀ i : Fin n, (after S) i k := h
  have h₂ : (after S) k k := h₁ k
  have h₃ : ∀ i : Fin n, i ≠ k → ∃ c ∈ S, c.fst = i ∧ c.snd = k ∨ c.fst = k ∧ c.snd = i := by
    intro i hi
    have h₄ : (after S) i k := h₁ i
    have h₅ : ¬ (initialState n) i k := by
      simp [initialState, Function.funext_iff]
      intro h_eq
      apply hi
      exact h_eq
    have h₆ : ∃ t ≤ S.length, (after (S.take t)) i k ∧ ¬ (after (S.take (t - 1))) i k := by
      use S.length
      constructor
      · exact h₄
      · intro h_contra
        induction S with
        | nil => contradiction
        | cons c cs IH =>
          simp_all [after, makeCalls, initialState]
    rcases h₆ with ⟨t, ht₁, ht₂, ht₃⟩
    cases t
    · contradiction
    · have h₇ : S.get? (t - 1) = some (S[t - 1]) := by
        apply List.get?_eq_get
        omega
      have h₈ : (after (S.take (t - 1))) (S[t - 1]).fst (S[t - 1]).snd ∨
                (after (S.take (t - 1))) (S[t - 1]).snd (S[t - 1]).fst := by
        simp_all [after, makeCalls]
      cases' h₈ with h₈ h₈ <;> simp_all [after, makeCalls]
      <;> omega
  have h₄ : Fintype.card (Fin n) = n := by simp
  have h₅ : Fintype.card {i : Fin n // i ≠ k} = n - 1 := by
    simp [Fintype.card_subtype_compl, h₄]
  have h₆ : S.length ≥ n - 1 := by
    calc
      S.length ≥ Fintype.card {i : Fin n // i ≠ k} := by
        apply Nat.le_of_subsingleton
        sorry
      _ = n - 1 := h₅
  omega

have h₁ : (after S) k k := by
    apply h
    exact k
  have h₂ : ∀ i : Fin n, (after S) i k := h
  have h₃ : ∃ T ⊆ S, T.length = n - 1 ∧ ∀ i : Fin n, (after T) i k := by
    -- Use minimality argument: take minimal subsequence achieving allKnow
    have h₄ : ∃ T, T ⊆ S ∧ ∀ i : Fin n, (after T) i k := by
      use S
      constructor
      · rfl
      · exact h
    rcases exists_to_minimal_exists (λ T => T ⊆ S ∧ ∀ i : Fin n, (after T) i k) with ⟨T, hT, hT_min⟩
    use T
    constructor
    · exact hT.1
    · have hT_nonempty : T ≠ [] := by
        intro hT_empty
        rw [hT_empty] at hT
        simp at hT
        have hT_k : (initialState n) k k := by
          apply initialState_self
        have hT_not_k : ¬ (initialState n) (Fin.succ k) k := by
          apply initialState_not_other
        contradiction
      -- In a minimal sequence, each call must spread k's secret to a new agent
      -- So length must be at least n-1
      have hT_length : T.length ≥ n - 1 := by
        -- Each call can increase the number of agents knowing k's secret by at most 1
        -- Initially only k knows k's secret
        -- Finally all n agents know it
        -- So need at least n-1 calls
        have h_initial : (initialState n) k k := by
          apply initialState_self
        have h_initial_not : ∀ i : Fin n, i ≠ k → ¬ (initialState n) i k := by
          intro i hi
          apply initialState_not_other
        have h_final : ∀ i : Fin n, (after T) i k := hT.2
        -- Count how many agents learn k's secret during T
        -- Start with 1 (just k), end with n
        -- Each call adds at most 1
        -- So length ≥ n - 1
        have h_count : T.length ≥ n - 1 := by
          -- Formalize the counting argument
          have h_step : ∀ (σ : List (Call n)) (c : Call n),
              (after (σ ++ [c])) k k →
              (∀ i, (after σ) i k → (after (σ ++ [c])) i k) ∧
              (∀ i, (after (σ ++ [c])) i k → (after σ) i k ∨ i = c.fst ∨ i = c.snd) := by
            intro σ c hk
            constructor
            · intro i hi
              apply after_cons_mono
              exact hi
            · intro i hi
              apply after_cons_cases
              exact hi
          -- Use induction on T
          induction T with
          | nil =>
            have h_nil : ∀ i : Fin n, (initialState n) i k := hT.2
            have h_nil_k : (initialState n) k k := by
              apply initialState_self
            have h_nil_not : ∀ i : Fin n, i ≠ k → ¬ (initialState n) i k := by
              intro i hi
              apply initialState_not_other
            have h_nil_contra : n ≤ 1 := by
              -- If n > 1, pick i ≠ k, contradiction
              by_cases hn : n ≤ 1
              · exact hn
              · have h_n_ge_2 : n ≥ 2 := by
                  omega
                have h_exists_i : ∃ i : Fin n, i ≠ k := by
                  apply Fin.exists_ne
                  exact h_n_ge_2
                rcases h_exists_i with ⟨i, hi⟩
                have h_i_knows : (initialState n) i k := h_nil i
                have h_i_not_knows : ¬ (initialState n) i k := h_nil_not i hi
                contradiction
            omega
          | cons c T ih =>
            have h_cons : ∀ i : Fin n, (after (c :: T)) i k := hT.2
            have h_T : ∀ i : Fin n, (after T) i k → (after (c :: T)) i k := by
              intro i hi
              apply after_cons_mono
              exact hi
            -- Either c spreads k's secret to someone new or not
            -- But by minimality, it must spread to someone new
            have h_c_new : ∃ i, ¬ (after T) i k ∧ (after (c :: T)) i k := by
              -- If not, then T would already satisfy allKnow, contradicting minimality
              by_contra h_c_not_new
              push_neg at h_c_not_new
              have h_T_all : ∀ i : Fin n, (after T) i k := by
                intro i
                have h_i_after : (after (c :: T)) i k := h_cons i
                cases h_c_not_new i h_i_after with
                | inl h_i_T => exact h_i_T
                | inr h_i_c =>
                  cases h_i_c with
                  | inl h_i_eq_c_fst =>
                    -- Need to show (after T) i k
                    -- But i = c.fst, and if c.fst didn't know before, contradiction
                    sorry
                  | inr h_i_eq_c_snd =>
                    sorry
              -- This contradicts minimality of T
              have h_T_subset : T ⊆ S := by
                apply List.Sublist.tail
                exact hT.1
              have h_T_prop : T ⊆ S ∧ ∀ i : Fin n, (after T) i k := by
                constructor
                · exact h_T_subset
                · exact h_T_all
              have h_T_lt : T.length < (c :: T).length := by
                simp
              exact hT_min T h_T_lt h_T_prop
            rcases h_c_new with ⟨i, h_i_not_T, h_i_after_cT⟩
            -- Now use induction hypothesis
            have h_T_min' : ∀ U, U ⊆ T → (∀ i : Fin n, (after U) i k) → U.length ≥ T.length := by
              -- From minimality of T for the property
              sorry
            -- The number of agents knowing k's secret increases by at least 1
            -- So T.length ≥ n - 2, thus (c :: T).length ≥ n - 1
            have h_T_len : T.length ≥ n - 2 := by
              -- Apply induction hypothesis to T
              -- But T might not satisfy allKnow, so this approach fails
              sorry
            omega
        exact h_count
      exact hT_length
  have h_S_len : S.length ≥ T.length := by
    apply List.Sublist.length_le
    exact h₃.1
  omega

have h₁ : ∀ i : Fin n, (after S) i k := h
  have h₂ : (after S) k k := h₁ k
  have h₃ : ∀ i : Fin n, i ≠ k → ∃ c ∈ S, c.fst = i ∧ c.snd = k ∨ c.fst = k ∧ c.snd = i := by
    intro i hi
    have h₄ : (after S) i k := h₁ i
    have h₅ : ¬ (initialState n) i k := by
      simp [initialState, Function.update]
      exact hi
    have h₆ : ∃ t ≤ S.length, (after (S.take t)) i k ∧ ¬ (after (S.take (t - 1))) i k := by
      apply exists_to_minimal_exists
      use S.length
      simp [h₄]
    rcases h₆ with ⟨t, t_le, h₇, h₈⟩
    cases t
    · simp_all
    · have h₉ : t - 1 < S.length := by omega
      have h₁₀ : S[t - 1] ∈ S := by
        apply List.get?_mem
        omega
      have h₁₁ : (after (S.take (t - 1))).fst = i ∨ (after (S.take (t - 1))).snd = i := by
        sorry
      sorry
  sorry

have h₁ : ∀ i : Fin n, (after S) i k := h
  have h₂ : (after S) k k := h₁ k
  have h₃ : ∀ i : Fin n, i ≠ k → ∃ c ∈ S, c.fst = i ∧ c.snd = k ∨ c.fst = k ∧ c.snd = i := by
    intro i hi
    have h₄ : (after S) i k := h₁ i
    have h₅ : ¬ (initialState n) i k := by
      simp [initialState, hi]
    have h₆ : ∃ t ≤ S.length, (after (S.take t)) i k ∧ ¬ (after (S.take (t - 1))) i k := by
      apply exists_to_minimal_exists
      use S.length
      simp [h₄]
    rcases h₆ with ⟨t, ht₁, ht₂, ht₃⟩
    have h₇ : t > 0 := by
      intro h₇
      simp_all [Nat.le_zero_iff]
    have h₈ : S.take t = (S.take (t - 1)) ++ [S[t - 1]] := by
      rw [List.take_succ']
      omega
    rw [h₈] at ht₂
    simp [makeCalls, after] at ht₂
    cases S[t - 1] with
    | mk a b =>
      have h₉ : a = i ∨ b = i := by
        cases ht₂
        all_goals
          try
            { left; assumption }
          try
            { right; assumption }
      have h₁₀ : a = k ∨ b = k := by
        cases ht₂
        all_goals
          try
            { left; assumption }
          try
            { right; assumption }
      cases h₉ <;> cases h₁₀ <;> simp_all
  have h₄ : Fintype.card (Fin n) = n := by simp
  have h₅ : Fintype.card {i : Fin n // i ≠ k} = n - 1 := by
    simp [Fintype.card_subtype_compl, h₄]
  have h₆ : n - 1 ≤ S.length := by
    calc
      n - 1 = Fintype.card {i : Fin n // i ≠ k} := by rw [h₅]
      _ ≤ S.length := by
        apply Fintype.card_le_of_injective
        intro i hi
        rcases h₃ i hi.prop with ⟨c, hc, hc'⟩
        exact c
        intro i j hi hj h
        simp_all
  omega

revert h
  induction S with
  | nil => simp [allKnow, after, initialState]
  | cons c S ih =>
    simp_all [allKnow, after, makeCalls, initialState]
    intro h
    have : (n - 1 : ℕ) < S.length + 1 := by
      apply Nat.lt_succ_of_le
      apply ih
      simp_all [allKnow, after, makeCalls]
    omega

have h₁ : (after S) k k := by simp [allKnow] at h; exact h k
  have h₂ : ∀ i : Fin n, (after S) i k := by simp [allKnow] at h; exact h
  have h₃ : S.length ≥ n - 1 := by
    apply Nat.le_of_not_gt
    intro h₄
    have h₅ : S.length < n - 1 := h₄
    have h₆ : (after S) = initialState n := by
      apply Eq.symm
      apply Eq.symm
      apply makeCalls_empty
      apply List.eq_nil_of_length_eq_zero
      omega
    rw [h₆] at h₂
    have h₇ : ¬ (initialState n) k k := by simp [initialState]
    exact h₇ (h₂ k)
  omega

revert h
  induction S with
  | nil => simp [allKnow, after, initialState]
  | cons c S IH =>
    simp_all [allKnow, after, makeCall, initialState]
    intro h
    cases n
    case zero => simp_all
    case succ n =>
      have : (n + 1) - 1 ≤ S.length := by
        apply Nat.le_of_lt_succ
        apply IH
        simp_all [allKnow, after, makeCall]
      omega

have h₁ : ∀ i : Fin n, (after S) i k := h
  have h₂ : (after S) k k := h₁ k
  have h₃ : ∀ i : Fin n, i ≠ k → ∃ c ∈ S, c.fst = i ∧ c.snd = k ∨ c.fst = k ∧ c.snd = i := by
    intro i hi
    have h₄ : (after S) i k := h₁ i
    have h₅ : ¬ (initialState n) i k := by
      simp [initialState, Function.update]
      exact hi
    have h₆ : ∃ t ≤ S.length, (after (S.take t)) i k ∧ ¬ (after (S.take (t - 1))) i k := by
      apply exists_to_minimal_exists
      use S.length
      simp [h₄]
    rcases h₆ with ⟨t, t_le, h₇, h₈⟩
    cases t
    · simp_all
    · have h₉ : t - 1 < S.length := by omega
      have h₁₀ : S[t - 1] ∈ S := by
        apply List.get?_mem
        omega
      have h₁₁ : (after (S.take (t - 1 + 1))) i k := h₇
      simp at h₁₁
      have h₁₂ : (after (S.take (t - 1))).fst (S[t - 1].fst) (S[t - 1].snd) ∨
          (after (S.take (t - 1))).fst (S[t - 1].snd) (S[t - 1].fst) := by
        simp [makeCalls, after, h₁₁, h₈]
      cases' h₁₂ with h₁₂ h₁₂ <;> simp_all
  have h₄ : Fintype.card (Fin n) = n := by simp
  have h₅ : Fintype.card {i : Fin n // i ≠ k} = n - 1 := by
    simp [Fintype.card_subtype_compl, h₄]
  have h₆ : n - 1 ≤ S.length := by
    calc
      n - 1 = Fintype.card {i : Fin n // i ≠ k} := h₅
      _ ≤ S.length := by
        apply Finset.card_le_card
        apply Finset.injective_iff_injective.mpr
        intro i j hij
        simp_all
  omega

have h₁ : (after S) k k := by
    apply h
    exact k
  have h₂ : ∀ i : Fin n, (after S) i k := h
  have h₃ : S.length ≥ n - 1 := by
    apply Nat.le_of_not_gt
    intro h₄
    have h₅ : S.length < n - 1 := h₄
    have h₆ : n - 1 > S.length := by linarith
    have h₇ : n > S.length + 1 := by omega
    have h₈ : (after S).length = n := by
      simp [after, makeCalls, initialState]
    have h₉ : ∀ i : Fin n, (after S) i k → False := by
      intro i h₁₀
      have h₁₁ : (after S) i k := h₁₀
      have h₁₂ : i = k ∨ i ≠ k := by apply Classical.em
      cases h₁₂
      · simp_all
      · have h₁₃ : (after S) i k := h₁₁
        have h₁₄ : S.length < n - 1 := h₅
        have h₁₅ : n - 1 > S.length := by linarith
        have h₁₆ : n > S.length + 1 := by omega
        have h₁₇ : False := by
          apply Nat.not_lt_zero
          apply Nat.zero_le
        exact h₁₇
    exact h₉ k h₁
  omega

revert h
  induction n with
  | zero => simp_all
  | succ n ih =>
    cases k
    all_goals simp_all [allKnow, after, initialState, makeCalls]
    all_goals
      have : ∀ i : Fin n.succ, ∃ c ∈ S, c.fst = i ∨ c.snd = i := by
        intro i
        specialize h i
        induction S with
        | nil => simp_all
        | cons c cs =>
          simp_all [makeCalls, updateCall]
          cases h
          all_goals
            try
              exact ⟨c, by simp, by tauto⟩
            try
              have := ih (fun j => h j) -- use induction hypothesis on smaller list
              simp_all
      have h₁ := this 0
      have h₂ := this ⟨n, Nat.lt_succ_self n⟩
      simp_all
      omega

cases n
  case zero => simp_all
  case succ n =>
    have : (n + 1 : Nat) - 1 = n := by simp
    rw [this]
    apply Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt _ (Nat.le_of_lt_succ (Nat.lt_succ_self _))
    apply Nat.le_of_sub_eq_zero
    have h₁ : ∀ i : Fin (n + 1), (after S) i k := by
      intro i
      exact h i
    have h₂ : (after S) k k := h k
    clear h
    induction S with
    | nil => simp_all
    | cons c S ih =>
      simp_all [after, makeCalls, initialState, allKnow]

revert h
  induction S with
  | nil => simp [allKnow, after, initialState]
  | cons c S IH =>
    intro h
    have : allKnow (after S) k ∨ ¬ allKnow (after S) k := by apply Classical.em
    cases this with
    | inl h' => exact Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ (IH h')
    | inr h' =>
      have : (after (c :: S)) = makeCall (after S) c := by simp [after, makeCalls]
      rw [this] at h
      simp_all [allKnow, makeCall, knows]
      have : (after S) k k := by
        apply initialState_knows_own
      have : ∃ i, ¬ (after S) i k := by
        push_neg at h'
        exact h'
      rcases this with ⟨i, hi⟩
      have : (makeCall (after S) c) i k := by
        apply h
      simp_all [makeCall, knows]
      omega

cases n
  case zero => simp_all
  case succ n =>
    have h₁ : (n + 1 - 1 : Nat) ≤ S.length := by
      apply Nat.le_of_lt_succ
      apply Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt
      · apply Nat.sub_le
      · exact h
    omega

cases n
  case zero => simp_all
  case succ n =>
    have : (n + 1 - 1 : ℕ) = n := by simp
    rw [this]
    clear this
    induction n with
    | zero => simp_all
    | succ n ihn =>
      simp_all [allKnow, after, makeCalls, initialState]
      -- We use the fact that initially only agent k knows their secret
      -- and each call can increase the number of people who know k's secret by at most 1
      have h₁ : (initialState (n + 2)) k k := by simp [initialState]
      have h₂ : ∀ (σ : List (Call (n + 2))), 
          (after σ) k k := by
        intro σ
        induction σ with
        | nil => simp [after, initialState]
        | cons c σ ih =>
          simp [after, makeCalls, ih]
          cases c
          simp [*]
      have h₃ : (after S) k k := h₂ S
      -- Count how many agents know k's secret
      let knows_k := fun i => (after S) i k
      have h₄ : (∑ i : Fin (n + 2), if knows_k i then 1 else 0) = n + 2 := by
        simp [Fin.sum_univ_eq_sum_range, Nat.add_comm]
        apply Eq.symm
        apply Eq.symm
        simp_all [allKnow]
      -- Initially only one agent knows k's secret
      have h₅ : (∑ i : Fin (n + 2), if (initialState (n + 2)) i k then 1 else 0) = 1 := by
        simp [initialState]
        apply Eq.symm
        simp [Fin.sum_univ_eq_sum_range]
        induction n + 2 with
        | zero => simp
        | succ m ih =>
          simp_all [Fin.sum_univ_succ]
      -- Each call increases the sum by at most 1
      have h₆ : ∀ (σ : List (Call (n + 2))) (c : Call (n + 2)),
          (∑ i : Fin (n + 2), if (makeCalls (after σ) [c]) i k then 1 else 0) ≤
          (∑ i : Fin (n + 2), if (after σ) i k then 1 else 0) + 1 := by
        intro σ c
        simp [makeCalls, after]
        cases c
        simp_all
        -- The maximum increase is when exactly one of the two participants knew the secret before
        have h₇ : (∑ i : Fin (n + 2), if ((after σ) i c.fst ∨ (after σ) i c.snd) ∧ (after σ) i k then 1 else 0) ≤
          (∑ i : Fin (n + 2), if (after σ) i k then 1 else 0) + 1 := by
          sorry
        exact h₇
      -- Therefore, we need at least n+1 calls to go from 1 to n+2
      have h₈ : S.length ≥ n + 1 := by
        sorry
      linarith

have h₁ : ∀ i : Fin n, (after S) i k := h
  have h₂ : (after S) k k := h₁ k
  have h₃ : ∀ i : Fin n, i ≠ k → ∃ c ∈ S, c.fst = i ∧ c.snd = k ∨ c.fst = k ∧ c.snd = i := by
    intro i hi
    have h₄ : (after S) i k := h₁ i
    have h₅ : ¬ (initialState n) i k := by
      simp [initialState, Function.update]
      exact hi
    have h₆ : ∃ t ≤ S.length, (after (S.take t)) i k ∧ ¬ (after (S.take (t - 1))) i k := by
      apply exists_to_minimal_exists
      use S.length
      simp [h₄, h₅]
    rcases h₆ with ⟨t, t_le, h₇, h₈⟩
    cases t
    · simp_all
    · have h₉ : (after (S.take (t + 1))) i k := h₇
      have h₁₀ : ¬ (after (S.take t)) i k := h₈
      have h₁₁ : S.get? t = some (S[t]) := by
        rw [List.get?_eq_get]
        exact Nat.lt_of_succ_le (by linarith)
      simp [after, makeCalls, List.foldl] at h₉ h₁₀
      have h₁₂ : (S[t]).fst = i ∧ (S[t]).snd = k ∨ (S[t]).fst = k ∧ (S[t]).snd = i := by
        cases' S[t] with a b
        simp_all [Call]
        <;> omega
      exact ⟨S[t], by simp [List.mem_iff_get?, h₁₁], h₁₂⟩
  have h₄ : Fintype.card (Fin n) = n := by simp
  have h₅ : Fintype.card {i : Fin n // i ≠ k} = n - 1 := by
    simp [Fintype.card_subtype_compl, h₄]
  have h₆ : n - 1 ≤ S.length := by
    calc
      n - 1 = Fintype.card {i : Fin n // i ≠ k} := h₅
      _ ≤ S.length := by
        apply Finset.card_le_card
        apply Finset.injective_iff_injective.mpr
        intro i j hij
        rcases h₃ i.prop with ⟨c, hc, hci⟩
        rcases h₃ j.prop with ⟨d, hd, hdj⟩
        simp_all
  omega

have h₁ : ∀ i : Fin n, (after S) i k := h
  have h₂ : (after S) k k := h₁ k
  have h₃ : ∀ i : Fin n, i ≠ k → ∃ c ∈ S, c.fst = i ∧ c.snd = k ∨ c.fst = k ∧ c.snd = i := by
    intro i hi
    have h₄ : (after S) i k := h₁ i
    have h₅ : ¬ (initialState n) i k := by
      simp [initialState, Function.update]
      exact hi
    have h₆ : ∃ t ≤ S.length, (after (S.take t)) i k ∧ ¬ (after (S.take (t - 1))) i k := by
      apply exists_to_minimal_exists
      use S.length
      simp [h₄]
    rcases h₆ with ⟨t, t_le, h₇, h₈⟩
    cases t
    · simp_all
    · have h₉ : t - 1 < S.length := by omega
      have h₁₀ : S[t - 1] ∈ S := by
        apply List.get?_mem
        omega
      have h₁₁ : (after (S.take (t - 1 + 1))) i k := h₇
      simp [makeCalls, after] at h₁₁
      have h₁₂ : S[t - 1].fst = i ∨ S[t - 1].snd = i := by
        apply Or.intro_left
        sorry
      have h₁₃ : S[t - 1].fst = k ∨ S[t - 1].snd = k := by
        apply Or.intro_right
        sorry
      exact ⟨S[t - 1], h₁₀, by tauto⟩
  have h₄ : Fintype.card (Fin n) = n := by simp
  have h₅ : Fintype.card {i : Fin n // i ≠ k} = n - 1 := by
    simp [Fintype.card_subtype_compl, h₄]
  have h₆ : n - 1 ≤ S.length := by
    calc
      n - 1 = Fintype.card {i : Fin n // i ≠ k} := h₅
      _ ≤ S.length := by
        apply Finset.card_le_card
        intro i
        simp
        rcases h₃ i.1 i.2 with ⟨c, hc, hc'⟩
        exact ⟨c, hc⟩
  omega

have h₁ : ∀ i : Fin n, (after S) i k := h
  have h₂ : (after S) k k := h₁ k
  have h₃ : ∀ i : Fin n, i ≠ k → ∃ c ∈ S, c.fst = i ∧ c.snd = k ∨ c.fst = k ∧ c.snd = i := by
    intro i hi
    have h₄ : (after S) i k := h₁ i
    have h₅ : ¬ (initialState n) i k := by
      simp [initialState, Function.update]
      exact hi
    have h₆ : ∃ t ≤ S.length, (after (S.take t)) i k ∧ ¬ (after (S.take (t - 1))) i k := by
      apply exists_to_minimal_exists
      use S.length
      simp [h₄]
    rcases h₆ with ⟨t, t_le, h₇, h₈⟩
    cases t
    · simp_all
    · have h₉ : S.take (succ t) = (S.take t) ++ [S[t]] := by
        rw [List.take_succ']
        simp [Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.lt_succ_self t) t_le]
      simp_all [makeCalls, after]
  have h₄ : Fintype.card (Fin n) = n := by simp
  have h₅ : Fintype.card {i : Fin n // i ≠ k} = n - 1 := by
    simp [Fintype.card_subtype_compl, h₄]
  have h₆ : S.length ≥ n - 1 := by
    calc
      S.length ≥ Fintype.card {i : Fin n // i ≠ k} := by
        apply Nat.le_of_not_lt
        intro hlt
        have h_inj : Function.Injective (fun i : {i : Fin n // i ≠ k} ↦ Classical.choose (h₃ i.1 i.2)) := by
          intro i j hij
          simp_all
        have h_card : Fintype.card {i : Fin n // i ≠ k} ≤ Fintype.card (Fin S.length) := by
          apply Fintype.card_le_of_injective h_inj
        simp_all
      _ = n - 1 := h₅
  omega

have h₁ : ∀ i : Fin n, (after S) i k := h
  have h₂ : (after S) k k := h₁ k
  have h₃ : ∀ i : Fin n, i ≠ k → ∃ c ∈ S, c.fst = i ∧ c.snd = k ∨ c.fst = k ∧ c.snd = i := by
    intro i hi
    have h₄ : (after S) i k := h₁ i
    -- Use induction on the call sequence to show that for i to learn k's secret,
    -- there must be a call involving i and someone who already knows k's secret.
    -- The minimal such call must involve k directly or someone who learned from k earlier.
    -- But since initially only k knows their own secret, the information must flow through calls with k.
    sorry
  -- Since there are n-1 agents other than k, and each needs at least one distinct call with k
  -- (or a chain that ultimately requires n-1 calls), we get the bound.
  sorry

have h₁ : ∀ i : Fin n, (after S) i k := h
  have h₂ : (after S) k k := h₁ k
  have h₃ : ∀ i : Fin n, i ≠ k → ∃ c ∈ S, c.fst = i ∧ c.snd = k ∨ c.fst = k ∧ c.snd = i := by
    intro i hi
    have h₄ : (after S) i k := h₁ i
    have h₅ : ¬ (initialState n) i k := by
      simp [initialState, Function.update]
      exact hi
    have h₆ : ∃ t ≤ S.length, (after (S.take t)) i k ∧ ¬ (after (S.take (t - 1))) i k := by
      apply exists_to_minimal_exists
      use S.length
      simp [h₄]
    rcases h₆ with ⟨t, t_le, h₇, h₈⟩
    cases t
    · simp_all
    · have h₉ : S.take (succ t) = (S.take t) ++ [S[t]] := by
        rw [List.take_succ']
        exact Nat.lt_of_succ_le t_le
      simp_all [makeCalls, after]
  have h₄ : Fintype.card (Fin n) = n := by simp
  have h₅ : Fintype.card {i : Fin n // i ≠ k} = n - 1 := by
    simp [Fintype.card_subtype_compl, h₄]
  have h₆ : S.length ≥ n - 1 := by
    calc
      S.length ≥ Fintype.card {i : Fin n // i ≠ k} := by
        apply Nat.le_of_not_lt
        intro h_lt
        have h_inj : Function.Injective (fun (i : {i : Fin n // i ≠ k}) =>
          Classical.choose (h₃ i.val i.property)) := by
          intro i j hij
          simp_all
        have h_card : Fintype.card {i : Fin n // i ≠ k} ≤ S.length := by
          apply Fintype.card_le_of_injective h_inj
        linarith
      _ = n - 1 := h₅
  omega

have h₁ : ∀ i : Fin n, (after S) i k := h
  have h₂ : (after S) k k := h₁ k
  have h₃ : ∀ i : Fin n, i ≠ k → ∃ c ∈ S, c.fst = i ∧ c.snd = k ∨ c.fst = k ∧ c.snd = i := by
    intro i hi
    have h₄ : (after S) i k := h₁ i
    have h₅ : ¬ (initialState n) i k := by
      simp [initialState, Function.funext_iff]
      intro h₆
      have h₇ : i = k := by simpa using h₆
      contradiction
    have h₆ : ∃ j < S.length, (after (S.take j)) i k ∧ ¬ (after (S.take (j - 1))) i k := by
      apply exists_to_minimal_exists
      use S.length
      simp [h₄, h₅]
    rcases h₆ with ⟨j, hj₁, hj₂⟩
    have h₇ : j < S.length := hj₁.2
    have h₈ : S[j] = (i, k) ∨ S[j] = (k, i) := by
      have h₉ : (after (S.take (j + 1))) i k := hj₁.1
      have h₁₀ : ¬ (after (S.take j)) i k := hj₂ j (by linarith)
      simp [after, makeCalls, List.foldl, List.take_succ_of_lt_length] at h₉ h₁₀
      cases S[j] with
      | mk a b =>
        simp_all [Call.update]
        omega
    exact ⟨S[j], by simp [h₇], h₈⟩
  have h₄ : Fintype.card (Fin n) = n := by simp
  have h₅ : Fintype.card {i : Fin n // i ≠ k} = n - 1 := by
    simp [Fintype.card_subtype_compl, h₄]
  have h₆ : S.length ≥ n - 1 := by
    calc
      S.length ≥ Fintype.card {i : Fin n // i ≠ k} := by
        apply Nat.le_of_not_lt
        intro h₇
        have h₈ : ∃ f : {i : Fin n // i ≠ k} → S, Function.Injective f := by
          apply Finite.exists_injective_of_card_le
          simp [h₅, h₇]
        rcases h₈ with ⟨f, hf⟩
        have h₉ : ∀ i : {i : Fin n // i ≠ k}, f i ∈ S := by
          intro i
          exact (h₃ i.val i.property) |>.choose_spec
        have h₁₀ : ∀ i j : {i : Fin n // i ≠ k}, f i = f j → i = j := hf
        have h₁₁ : S.Nodup := by
          apply List.Nodup.intro
          intro i j hij
          have h₁₂ : S[i] = S[j] := by simp [hij]
          have h₁₃ : i = j := by
            apply Eq.symm
            apply List.get_eq_get_of_eq_of_lt
            assumption
            linarith
            linarith
          exact h₁₃
        have h₁₄ : S.length ≥ Fintype.card {i : Fin n // i ≠ k} := by
          apply Nat.le_of_not_lt
          intro h₁₅
          have h₁₆ : ∃ f : {i : Fin n // i ≠ k} → S, Function.Injective f := by
            apply Finite.exists_injective_of_card_le
            simp [h₅, h₁₅]
          contradiction
        exact h₁₄
      _ = n - 1 := by simp [h₅]
  omega

have h₁ : ∀ i : Fin n, (after S) i k := h
  have h₂ : (after S) k k := h₁ k
  have h₃ : ∀ i : Fin n, i ≠ k → ∃ c ∈ S, c.fst = i ∧ c.snd = k ∨ c.fst = k ∧ c.snd = i := by
    intro i hi
    have h₄ : (after S) i k := h₁ i
    have h₅ : ¬ (initialState n) i k := by
      simp [initialState, hi]
    have h₆ : ∃ t ≤ S.length, (after (S.take t)) i k ∧ ¬ (after (S.take (t - 1))) i k := by
      apply exists_to_minimal_exists
      use S.length
      simp [h₄]
    rcases h₆ with ⟨t, t_le, h₇, h₈⟩
    cases t
    · simp_all
    · have h₉ : t - 1 < S.length := by omega
      have h₁₀ : S[t - 1] ∈ S := by
        apply List.get?_mem
        exact Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt (Nat.zero_le _) h₉
      have h₁₁ : (after (S.take t)) = makeCall (after (S.take (t - 1))) S[t - 1] := by
        simp [after, makeCalls, List.take_succ, Nat.sub_add_cancel (Nat.succ_pos _)]
      rw [h₁₁] at h₇
      simp [makeCall, Function.update, h₇] at h₇
      cases h₇
      · left
        exact ⟨S[t - 1].fst, S[t - 1].snd, rfl⟩
      · right
        exact ⟨S[t - 1].fst, S[t - 1].snd, rfl⟩
  have h₄ : (Finset.univ : Finset (Fin n)).card = n := by simp
  have h₅ : (Finset.filter (λ i => i ≠ k) Finset.univ).card = n - 1 := by
    simp [Finset.card_filter, h₄]
  have h₆ : S.length ≥ n - 1 := by
    calc
      S.length ≥ (Finset.filter (λ i => i ≠ k) Finset.univ).card := by
        apply Nat.le_of_not_gt
        intro h_gt
        have h₇ : ∃ f : Fin n → Call n, Function.Injective f ∧ ∀ i, i ≠ k → f i ∈ S ∧ (f i).fst = i ∧ (f i).snd = k ∨ (f i).fst = k ∧ (f i).snd = i := by
          apply Classical.choose_spec
          apply Classical.em
        exact absurd h_gt (by simp_all)
      _ = n - 1 := h₅
  omega

have h₁ : (after S) k k := h k
  have h₂ : ∀ i : Fin n, (after S) i k := h
  have h₃ : S.length ≥ n - 1 := by
    apply Nat.le_of_not_gt
    intro h₄
    have h₅ : S.length < n - 1 := h₄
    have h₆ : n - 1 > S.length := h₅
    have h₇ : n > S.length + 1 := by omega

      apply Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt h₈

  omega

  have h₄ : Fintype.card (Fin n) = n := by simp

  have h₂ : (after S) k k := h₁ k
  have h₃ : ∀ i : Fin n, i ≠ k → ∃ c ∈ S, c.fst = i ∧ c.snd = k ∨ c.fst = k ∧ c.snd = i := by

      rw [h₁₁] at h₇
      simp [makeCall, Function.update] at h₇
      have h₁₂ : S[t - 1].fst = i ∨ S[t - 1].snd = i := by
        apply Or.imp _ _ h₇
        · intro h
          simp_all
        · intro h
          simp_all
      have h₁₃ : S[t - 1].fst = k ∨ S[t - 1].snd = k := by
        apply Or.imp _ _ h₇
        · intro h
          simp_all
        · intro h
          simp_all
      cases h₁₂ <;> cases h₁₃ <;> simp_all
  have h₄ : Fintype.card (Fin n) = n := by simp
  have h₅ : Fintype.card {i : Fin n // i ≠ k} = n - 1 := by
    rw [Fintype.card_subtype_compl, h₄]
    simp
  have h₆ : S.length ≥ n - 1 := by
    calc
      S.length ≥ Fintype.card {i : Fin n // i ≠ k} := by
        apply Nat.le_of_not_lt
        intro h
        have h₇ : ∃ f : {i : Fin n // i ≠ k} → S, Function.Injective f := by
          apply Finite.exists_injective_of_card_le
          omega
        rcases h₇ with ⟨f, hf⟩
        have h₈ : ∀ i : {i : Fin n // i ≠ k}, ∃ c ∈ S, c.fst = i.val ∧ c.snd = k ∨ c.fst = k ∧ c.snd = i.val := by
          intro i
          exact h₃ i.val i.property
        have h₉ : ∀ i : {i : Fin n // i ≠ k}, f i ∈ S := by
          intro i
          exact h₈ i |>.choose_spec
        have h₁₀ : ∀ i j : {i : Fin n // i ≠ k}, f i = f j → i = j := hf
        have h₁₁ : ∀ i : {i : Fin n // i ≠ k}, (f i).fst = i.val ∨ (f i).snd = i.val := by
          intro i
          cases h₈ i with
          | intro c hc =>
            cases hc with
            | intro h => simp_all
            | intro h => simp_all
        have h₁₂ : ∀ i : {i : Fin n // i ≠ k}, (f i).fst = k ∨ (f i).snd = k := by
          intro i
          cases h₈ i with
          | intro c hc =>
            cases hc with
            | intro h => simp_all
            | intro h => simp_all
        have h₁₃ : ∀ i : {i : Fin n // i ≠ k}, f i = ⟨k, i.val, by simp_all⟩ ∨ f i = ⟨i.val, k, by simp_all⟩ := by
          intro i
          cases h₁₁ i <;> cases h₁₂ i <;> simp_all
        have h₁₄ : Function.Injective (fun i => i.val) := by
          intro i j h
          simp_all
        have h₁₅ : n - 1 ≤ S.length := by
          calc
            n - 1 = Fintype.card {i : Fin n // i ≠ k} := by rw [h₅]
            _ ≤ S.length := by
              apply Fintype.card_le_of_injective f hf
        omega
      _ = n - 1 := by rw [h₅]
  omega

have h₁ : ∀ i : Fin n, (after S) i k := h
  have h₂ : (after S) k k := h₁ k
  have h₃ : ∀ i : Fin n, i ≠ k → ∃ c ∈ S, c.fst = i ∧ c.snd = k ∨ c.fst = k ∧ c.snd = i := by
    intro i hi
    have h₄ : (after S) i k := h₁ i
    have h₅ : ¬ (initialState n) i k := by
      simp [initialState, knows]
      exact hi
    have h₆ : ∃ t ≤ S.length, (after (S.take t)) i k ∧ ¬ (after (S.take (t - 1))) i k := by
      apply exists_to_minimal_exists
      use S.length
      simp [h₄]
    rcases h₆ with ⟨t, t_le, h₇, h₈⟩
    cases t
    · simp_all
    · have h₉ : t - 1 < S.length := by omega
      have h₁₀ : S[t - 1] ∈ S := by
        apply List.get?_mem
        exact Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt (Nat.zero_le _) h₉
      have h₁₁ : (after (S.take t)) = makeCall (after (S.take (t - 1))) S[t - 1] := by
        simp [after, makeCalls, List.take_succ, Nat.sub_add_cancel (Nat.succ_pos _)]
      rw [h₁₁] at h₇
      simp [makeCall, knows] at h₇
      cases h₇
      · left
        exact ⟨S[t - 1], h₁₀, h₇⟩
      · right
        exact ⟨S[t - 1], h₁₀, h₇⟩
  have h₄ : Fintype.card (Fin n) = n := by simp
  have h₅ : Fintype.card {i : Fin n // i ≠ k} = n - 1 := by
    simp [Fintype.card_subtype_compl, h₄]
  have h₆ : n - 1 ≤ S.length := by
    calc
      n - 1 = Fintype.card {i : Fin n // i ≠ k} := h₅
      _ ≤ S.length := by
        apply Fintype.card_le_of_injective
        intro i j hij
        rcases h₃ i.1 i.2 with ⟨c, hc, hc'⟩
        rcases h₃ j.1 j.2 with ⟨d, hd, hd'⟩
        -- This approach is too complex; instead use a simpler counting argument
        sorry
  omega
